zh.lifeSummary: 當Iestyn ap Gwrgan of Morgannwg於大約1014年出生在英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根時，他的父親King Gwrgan of Glywysing and Glamorgan5歲，母親Angharad Nest verch Gwyn of Powys24歲。他於大約1030年與Denise verch Bleddyn Kynaston of Powys結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1093年在威爾士格拉莫爾根爾比納享年81歲，埋葬在威爾士丹比爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Iestyn ap Gwrgan of Morgannwg于大约1014年出生在英国威尔斯格拉莫爾根时，他的父亲King Gwrgan of Glywysing and Glamorgan5岁，母亲Angharad Nest verch Gwyn of Powys24岁。他于大约1030年与Denise verch Bleddyn Kynaston of Powys结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1093年在威尔士格拉莫爾根爾比納享年81岁，埋葬在威尔士丹比爾。

nameMeanings.name: Gwrgan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish (Meath): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Geargáin ‘descendant of Geargán’ or shortened from Mac Geargáin ‘son of Geargán’, a personal name from a diminutive of garg ‘fierce’.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

en.lifeSummary: When Iestyn ap Gwrgan of Morgannwg was born about 1014, in Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, King Gwrgan of Glywysing and Glamorgan, was 5 and his mother, Angharad Nest verch Gwyn of Powys, was 24. He married Denise verch Bleddyn Kynaston of Powys about 1030. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died about 1093, in Rhiwbina, Glamorgan, Wales, at the age of 81, and was buried in Denbighshire, Wales.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Iestyn ap Gwrgan of Morgannwg est né environ 1014, à Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, King Gwrgan of Glywysing and Glamorgan, avait 5 ans et sa mère, Angharad Nest verch Gwyn of Powys, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Denise verch Bleddyn Kynaston of Powys environ 1030. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé environ 1093, à Rhiwbina, Glamorgan, Galles, à l’âge de 81 ans, et a été enterré à Denbighshire, Galles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Iestyn ap Gwrgan of Morgannwg um 1014 in Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater King Gwrgan of Glywysing and Glamorgan 5 und seine Mutter Angharad Nest verch Gwyn of Powys 24. Er hat um 1030 Denise verch Bleddyn Kynaston of Powys geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb um 1093 im Alter von 81 Jahren in Rhiwbina, Glamorgan, Wales und wurde in Denbighshire, Wales begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Iestyn ap Gwrgan of Morgannwg è nato il circa 1014 nel Glamorgan, Galles, Regno Unito, il suo padre, King Gwrgan of Glywysing and Glamorgan, aveva 5 anni e il suo madre, Angharad Nest verch Gwyn of Powys, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Denise verch Bleddyn Kynaston of Powys circa 1030. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì circa 1093, nel Rhiwbina, Glamorgan, Galles, all'età di 81 anni, e fu sepolto a Denbighshire, Galles.

ja.lifeSummary: Iestyn ap Gwrgan of Morgannwgが約1014年にイギリスウェールズグラモーガンで生まれた時，父King Gwrgan of Glywysing and Glamorganは5歳，母Angharad Nest verch Gwyn of Powysは24歳であった。約1030年にDenise verch Bleddyn Kynaston of Powysと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は約1093年にウェールズグラモーガンルヒウビナで81歳で死去し，ウェールズデンビグhシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Iestyn ap Gwrgan of Morgannwg(이)가 대략 1014년 영국 웨일스 글램르건에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 King Gwrgan of Glywysing and Glamorgan(은)는 5세였고, 그의 어머니 Angharad Nest verch Gwyn of Powys(은)는 24세였다. 그는 대략 1030년 Denise verch Bleddyn Kynaston of Powys(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1093년 웨일스 글램르건 라이w빈아에서 81세의 나이로 사망했으며 웨일스 덴비그h실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Iestyn ap Gwrgan of Morgannwg nasceu aproximadamente 1014, em Glamorgan, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, King Gwrgan of Glywysing and Glamorgan, tinha 5 anos e sua mãe, Angharad Nest verch Gwyn of Powys, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Denise verch Bleddyn Kynaston of Powys aproximadamente 1030. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1093, em Rhiwbina, Glamorgan, Gales, com 81 anos, e foi sepultado em Denbighshire, Gales.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Iestyn ap Gwrgan of Morgannwg родился около 1014 г. в местности глэморган, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени King Gwrgan of Glywysing and Glamorgan было 5 лет, а матери, которую звали Angharad Nest verch Gwyn of Powys, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Denise verch Bleddyn Kynaston of Powys около 1030 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер около 1093 г. в местности ривбина, глэморган, Уэльс в возрасте 81 год и был похоронен в местности денбаишир, Уэльс.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Iestyn ap Gwrgan of Morgannwg nació aproximadamente 1014, en Glamorgan, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, King Gwrgan of Glywysing and Glamorgan, tenía 5 años y su mamá, Angharad Nest verch Gwyn of Powys, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Denise verch Bleddyn Kynaston of Powys aproximadamente 1030. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1093, en Rhiwbina, Glamorgan, Gales, a la edad de 81 años, y fue sepultado en Denbighshire, Gales.
